name: Jasper AI
data_egress_concerns: Marketing briefs and brand guidelines uploaded to generate content may contain competitive strategy
Product descriptions and pricing details pasted into prompts
Customer persona data and segmentation details shared for targeted content creation
Internal messaging frameworks and positioning documents
training_use_default: Jasper states it does not use customer inputs or outputs to train models. Enterprise plans include additional contractual commitments. Review current Jasper trust documentation for specifics.
